items.english: The book is on the table.
The cup is on the table.
The laptop is on the desk.
The bag is on the chair.
The flowers are on the balcony.
The ball is under the table.
The cat is under the bed.
The shoe is under the chair.
The dog is under the bench.
The box is under the shelf.
The lamp is next to the bed.
The sofa is next to the window.
The fridge is next to the door.
The mirror is next to the bath.
The shelf is next to the desk.
The car is in front of the house.
The small table is in front of the sofa.
The door is in front of the corridor.
The balcony is in front of the sea.
The bench is in front of the garden.
The garden is behind the house.
The kitchen is behind the living room.
The bathroom is behind the kitchen.
The garage is behind the house.
The window is behind the curtains.

items.maltese: Is-siġġu huwa bejn il-mejda u t-tieqa.
items.english: The chair is between the table and the window.

items.maltese: Il-kamra tal-ikel hija bejn il-kċina u s-salott.
items.english: The dining room is between the kitchen and the living room.
The bench is between two trees.
The door is between two windows.

items.maltese: Il-lampa hija bejn is-sodda u l-armarju.
items.english: The lamp is between the bed and the wardrobe.
There is a cup on the bedside table.
There is a book under the lamp.
There is a plant next to the window.
There is a mattress in front of the wall.
There is a bicycle behind the garage.
There is a bag between the chairs.
In the kitchen there is a fridge next to the door.
In the living room there is a sofa in front of the television.

items.maltese: Fil-kamra tas-sodda hemm mera ħdejn l-armarju.
items.english: In the bedroom there is a mirror next to the wardrobe.
In the study there is a laptop on the desk.
In the garden there is a table under the tree.
The boy is on the sofa.
The female cat is under the chair.
The books are on the shelf.
The curtains are next to the window.
The shoes are under the bed.
The flowers are on the balcony.
The cars are in front of the bench.
I like to stay next to the window.

items.maltese: Ma nħobbx inpoġġi l-borża fuq is-sodda.
items.english: I do not like putting the bag on the bed.
I see the sea in front of the house.
The street is behind the garden.

items.maltese: Il-kelb jorqod bejn is-siġġu u s-sufan.
items.english: The dog sleeps between the chair and the sofa.
